column12: I've always had positive experiences when visiting the store, the staff are always friendly and the atmosphere is great. One improvement I could think of is the service during busy times could be faster.
I will say that while my drink came to me in a timely manner, it felt a little lackluster, but overall I did love the croissant that I received.
